creator: agifford@infowest.com
text:
I notice that this is still open and the problem still exists in the 
/usr/ports/mail/popper port (as of 16 FEB 2001).  The solution I proposed in 
the original PR is still the correct fix.  Delete line 757 from 
pop_dropcopy.c.  I hope the port maintainer will take action.  I wish there 
was a way to elevate this fix, since as long as this bug exists, in some 
cases e-mail is impossible to retrieve using POP unless someone manually 
edits the mailbox file.  Is there a way to elevate the priority level of an 
open bug?

Aaron out.

--
